message:
feat(orphan_reaper): route run_orphan_reaper_with_cx through reap_orphans_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-up to commit a91ce7b6: `run_orphan_reaper_with_cx` was
previously calling the legacy `reap_orphans(max_age)` inside its cx-
aware loop body. With this tick's new `reap_orphans_with_cx`, route
the internal reap through the cx-first variant so mid-cycle
cancellation bails between kills instead of only at the inter-cycle
sleep boundary.

Outer loop already checks `shutdown_flag` + `cx.is_cancel_requested()`
each iteration; the inner per-kill checkpoint now adds a third
cancellation observation point during a single reap cycle.

Verified via fork bypass: 23/23 orphan_reaper tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
